---
title: "OC17 gene abundance and geochemistry"
output: html_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggthemes)
library(RColorBrewer)
```


```{r}
rootdir = "/scratch/users/rsalcedo/OC17wc_deepauto/gene_based/geochem/"
abundir = "/scratch/users/rsalcedo/OC17wc_deepauto/gene_based/R_output/"
```

```{r}
geochem_original = read.csv(paste(rootdir, "arandia-gorostidi_etal_isme_supptables_urea_tableS1.csv", sep = ""))
geochem = geochem_original
geochem$sample = paste(geochem$site, "m", geochem$depth, "m", sep = "")

print(colnames(geochem))

geochem = select(geochem, c("sample", "site", "depth", "Salinity", "Temperature_C", "Fluorescence", "Dissolved_oxygen_sat.", "Average_urea_concentration_nM", "Ammonium_concentration_nM", "Average_nitrate_concentration_uM"))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
pathways = read.csv(paste(abundir, "transect_pathwaydf.csv", sep = ""))
pathways$X = NULL
KOs = read.csv(paste(abundir, "transect_KOdf.csv", sep = ""))
KOs$X = NULL

pathway_no_sc = subset(pathways, pathways$metabolism!="single copy")

totals = pathway_no_sc %>% group_by(site_m, depth_m) %>% summarize(sum(normalized_cov))
totals <- totals %>% 
       rename("auto_normcov" = "sum(normalized_cov)")
totals$sample = paste(totals$site_m, "m", totals$depth_m, "m", sep = "")

pathway_no_sc = pathway_no_sc %>%
  rename("auto_normcov" = "normalized_cov")
pathway_no_sc$sample = paste(pathway_no_sc$site_m, "m", pathway_no_sc$depth_m, "m", sep = "")

```

```{r}
pathway_geochem = merge(geochem, pathway_no_sc, by = "sample")
colnames(pathway_geochem)
pathway_geochem = select(pathway_geochem, c("sample", "site", "depth", "Salinity", "Temperature_C", "Fluorescence", "Dissolved_oxygen_sat.", "Average_urea_concentration_nM", "Ammonium_concentration_nM", "Average_nitrate_concentration_uM", "pathway", "auto_normcov"))
totals_geochem = merge(geochem, totals, by = "sample")
```
total - all depths
```{r}
# List of variables to test
variables <- c("sample", "site", "depth", "Salinity", "Temperature_C", "Fluorescence", "Dissolved_oxygen_sat.", "Average_urea_concentration_nM", "Ammonium_concentration_nM", "Average_nitrate_concentration_uM")

calculate_correlation <- function(df) {
  results <- data.frame(Variable = character(), 
                        Correlation = numeric(), 
                        P.Value = numeric(), 
                        Adjusted.P.Value = numeric(), 
                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  for (var in variables) {
    x <- df[[var]]
    y <- df$auto_normcov
    
    valid_indices <- complete.cases(x, y) & is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
    x <- x[valid_indices]
    y <- y[valid_indices]
    
    if (length(unique(x)) > 1 && length(unique(y)) > 1) {
      print(paste("Processing variable:", var))
      print(paste("Unique values in", var, ":", length(unique(x))))
      print(paste("Unique values in auto_normcov:", length(unique(y))))
      
      test <- try(cor.test(x, y, method = "pearson"), silent = TRUE)
      
      if (class(test) != "try-error" && !is.null(test$estimate)) {
        results <- rbind(results, 
                         data.frame(Variable = var, 
                                    Correlation = test$estimate, 
                                    P.Value = test$p.value,
                                    Adjusted.P.Value = p.adjust(test$p.value, method = "bonferroni", n = length(variables)),
                                    stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
      } else {
        print(paste("Skipping variable:", var, "- correlation not computed"))
      }
    } else {
      print(paste("Skipping variable:", var, "- insufficient unique values"))
    }
  }
  
  return(results)
}

# Apply the function to each site
tot_correlation_results <- totals_geochem %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  group_modify(~ calculate_correlation(.x)) %>%
  ungroup()

# View the results
print(tot_correlation_results)

write.csv(tot_correlation_results, paste0(rootdir, "/totals_correlation_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

totals_geochem %>%
  count(site)


```
pathway - all depths
```{r}
calculate_correlation <- function(df, num_tests) {
  results <- data.frame(Variable = character(), 
                        Correlation = numeric(), 
                        P.Value = numeric(), 
                        Adjusted.P.Value = numeric(), 
                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  for (var in variables) {
    x <- df[[var]]
    y <- df$auto_normcov
    
    valid_indices <- complete.cases(x, y) & is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
    x <- x[valid_indices]
    y <- y[valid_indices]
    
    if (length(unique(x)) > 1 && length(unique(y)) > 1) {
      print(paste("Processing variable:", var))
      print(paste("Unique values in", var, ":", length(unique(x))))
      print(paste("Unique values in auto_normcov:", length(unique(y))))
      
      test <- try(cor.test(x, y, method = "pearson"), silent = TRUE)
      
      if (class(test) != "try-error" && !is.null(test$estimate)) {
        results <- rbind(results, 
                         data.frame(Variable = var, 
                                    Correlation = test$estimate, 
                                    P.Value = test$p.value,
                                    Adjusted.P.Value = p.adjust(test$p.value, method = "bonferroni", n = num_tests),
                                    stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
      } else {
        print(paste("Skipping variable:", var, "- correlation not computed"))
      }
    } else {
      print(paste("Skipping variable:", var, "- insufficient unique values"))
    }
  }
  
  return(results)
}

correlation_results_pathways <- pathway_geochem %>%
  group_by(pathway, site) %>%
  group_modify(~ calculate_correlation(.x, length(variables))) %>%
  ungroup()

print(correlation_results_pathways)

write.csv(correlation_results_pathways, paste0(rootdir, "/pathway_correlation_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```
total - excluding 50m
```{r}
calculate_correlation <- function(df) {
  df <- df %>% filter(depth != 50)
  results <- data.frame(Variable = character(), 
                        Correlation = numeric(), 
                        P.Value = numeric(), 
                        Adjusted.P.Value = numeric(), 
                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  for (var in variables) {
    x <- df[[var]]
    y <- df$auto_normcov
    
    valid_indices <- complete.cases(x, y) & is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
    x <- x[valid_indices]
    y <- y[valid_indices]
    
    if (length(unique(x)) > 1 && length(unique(y)) > 1) {
      print(paste("Processing variable:", var))
      print(paste("Unique values in", var, ":", length(unique(x))))
      print(paste("Unique values in auto_normcov:", length(unique(y))))
      
      test <- try(cor.test(x, y, method = "pearson"), silent = TRUE)
      
      if (class(test) != "try-error" && !is.null(test$estimate)) {
        results <- rbind(results, 
                         data.frame(Variable = var, 
                                    Correlation = test$estimate, 
                                    P.Value = test$p.value,
                                    Adjusted.P.Value = p.adjust(test$p.value, method = "bonferroni", n = length(variables)),
                                    stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
      } else {
        print(paste("Skipping variable:", var, "- correlation not computed"))
      }
    } else {
      print(paste("Skipping variable:", var, "- insufficient unique values"))
    }
  }
  
  return(results)
}

tot50_correlation_results <- totals_geochem %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  group_modify(~ calculate_correlation(.x)) %>%
  ungroup()

print(tot50_correlation_results)

write.csv(tot50_correlation_results, paste0(rootdir, "/totals50_correlation_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


```

pathways - excluding 50m
```{r}
calculate_correlation <- function(df, num_tests) {
  df <- df %>% filter(depth != 50)
  
  results <- data.frame(Variable = character(), 
                        Correlation = numeric(), 
                        P.Value = numeric(), 
                        Adjusted.P.Value = numeric(), 
                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  for (var in variables) {
    x <- df[[var]]
    y <- df$auto_normcov
    
    valid_indices <- complete.cases(x, y) & is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
    x <- x[valid_indices]
    y <- y[valid_indices]
    
    if (length(unique(x)) > 1 && length(unique(y)) > 1) {
      print(paste("Processing variable:", var))
      print(paste("Unique values in", var, ":", length(unique(x))))
      print(paste("Unique values in auto_normcov:", length(unique(y))))
      
      test <- try(cor.test(x, y, method = "pearson"), silent = TRUE)
      
      if (class(test) != "try-error" && !is.null(test$estimate)) {
        results <- rbind(results, 
                         data.frame(Variable = var, 
                                    Correlation = test$estimate, 
                                    P.Value = test$p.value,
                                    Adjusted.P.Value = p.adjust(test$p.value, method = "bonferroni", n = num_tests),
                                    stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
      } else {
        print(paste("Skipping variable:", var, "- correlation not computed"))
      }
    } else {
      print(paste("Skipping variable:", var, "- insufficient unique values"))
    }
  }
  
  return(results)
}

correlation_results_pathways50 <- pathway_geochem %>%
  group_by(pathway, site) %>%
  group_modify(~ calculate_correlation(.x, length(variables))) %>%
  ungroup()

print(correlation_results_pathways50)

write.csv(correlation_results_pathways50, paste0(rootdir, "/pathway50_correlation_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


```
